```{=html}
<div class="page-head">
  <div class="page-eyebrow">
    <svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="0 0 32 32" fill="none"><path d="M 16 2 L 16 14" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="1.2"/><path d="M 16 14 Q 10 18, 8 28" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/><path d="M 16 14 Q 22 18, 24 28" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/><path d="M 16 14 L 16 28" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="1"/><ellipse cx="13" cy="3" rx="2.5" ry="1.5" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none"/><ellipse cx="19" cy="3" rx="2.5" ry="1.5" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none"/></svg>
    <span>§ Theory · Foundations</span>
  </div>
  <div>
    <h1 class="page-title">The central metaphor</h1>
    <p class="page-dek">One picture holds the whole methodology — a person, a moment, a gap, the bridge they build to cross it.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-body">

  <blockquote class="pull-quote">
    "Information is not simply a thing transmitted intact. In Sense-Making, it becomes useful when a person constructs it into help for moving across a gap."
    <span class="pull-quote-attr">— course paraphrase after Brenda Dervin</span>
  </blockquote>

  <div class="metaphor-wrap">
    <div class="metaphor-plate">
      <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none"><path d="M 32 6 L 32 58" stroke="#7a4d22" stroke-width="1"/><ellipse cx="32" cy="8" rx="3" ry="5" stroke="#7a4d22" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none"/></svg>
      <span>Plate I · The Central Metaphor</span>
    </div>

    <svg viewBox="0 0 1000 360" style="width:100%;height:auto;display:block">
      <defs>
        <pattern id="dm-stipple" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse" width="8" height="8">
          <circle cx="2" cy="2" r="0.6" fill="#a06a3a" opacity="0.5"/><circle cx="6" cy="5" r="0.5" fill="#a06a3a" opacity="0.4"/>
        </pattern>
      </defs>
      <path d="M 0 240 L 220 240 Q 280 240, 320 280 L 360 320 Q 420 350, 500 348 Q 580 350, 640 320 L 680 280 Q 720 240, 780 240 L 1000 240" stroke="#0c1410" stroke-width="2.2" fill="none" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M 220 240 Q 280 240, 320 280 L 360 320 Q 420 350, 500 348 Q 580 350, 640 320 L 680 280 Q 720 240, 780 240 L 780 360 L 220 360 Z" fill="url(#dm-stipple)" opacity="0.7"/>
      <g stroke="#5a6a55" stroke-width="0.6" fill="none">
        <path d="M 10 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/><path d="M 34 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/><path d="M 58 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/><path d="M 82 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/><path d="M 106 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/><path d="M 130 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/><path d="M 154 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/><path d="M 178 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/><path d="M 202 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/>
        <path d="M 790 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/><path d="M 814 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/><path d="M 838 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/><path d="M 862 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/><path d="M 886 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/><path d="M 910 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/><path d="M 934 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/><path d="M 958 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/><path d="M 982 240 q 2 -6, 1 -10"/>
      </g>
      <g stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none">
        <path d="M 70 240 q -2 -22, 4 -36"/><ellipse cx="68" cy="218" rx="5" ry="2" transform="rotate(-30 68 218)"/><ellipse cx="78" cy="208" rx="5" ry="2" transform="rotate(30 78 208)"/>
        <path d="M 920 240 q 2 -22, -4 -36"/><ellipse cx="922" cy="218" rx="5" ry="2" transform="rotate(30 922 218)"/><ellipse cx="912" cy="208" rx="5" ry="2" transform="rotate(-30 912 208)"/>
      </g>
      <g stroke="#0c1410" stroke-width="1.6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round">
        <circle cx="170" cy="186" r="10" fill="#e3e6d3"/><circle cx="167" cy="184" r="0.9" fill="#0c1410"/><circle cx="173" cy="184" r="0.9" fill="#0c1410"/><path d="M 167 189 q 3 2, 6 0" stroke-width="1"/>
        <path d="M 170 196 L 170 222"/><path d="M 170 204 L 158 214"/><path d="M 170 204 Q 184 200, 196 198"/><path d="M 170 222 L 162 240"/><path d="M 170 222 L 184 240"/>
      </g>
      <path d="M 196 198 Q 500 110, 804 198" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="1.6" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="2 5"/>
      <circle cx="196" cy="198" r="2.5" fill="#a06a3a"/><circle cx="804" cy="198" r="2.5" fill="#a06a3a"/>
      <g stroke="#0c1410" stroke-width="1.4" fill="none">
        <line x1="830" y1="240" x2="830" y2="180"/><path d="M 830 180 L 858 184 L 830 192 Z" fill="#a06a3a" stroke="#a06a3a"/>
        <line x1="848" y1="240" x2="848" y2="200"/><path d="M 848 200 L 870 204 L 848 210 Z"/>
      </g>
      <rect x="402" y="250" width="196" height="56" fill="#e3e6d3" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.7"/>
      <text x="500" y="274" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Cormorant Garamond', serif" font-style="italic" font-size="24" font-weight="600" fill="#0c1410" letter-spacing="2">gap</text>
      <text x="500" y="297" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono', monospace" font-size="8.5" font-weight="600" fill="#a06a3a" letter-spacing="1.6">QUESTIONS · CONFUSIONS · MUDDLES</text>
      <line x1="500" y1="304" x2="500" y2="334" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="2 3"/><circle cx="500" cy="334" r="2" fill="#a06a3a"/>
      <g font-family="'IBM Plex Mono', monospace" font-size="10" letter-spacing="1.5" fill="#a06a3a">
        <text x="40" y="28">SITUATION</text><line x1="40" y1="34" x2="180" y2="34" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.6"/>
        <text x="40" y="50" font-family="'IBM Plex Serif', serif" font-style="italic" font-size="11" letter-spacing="0" fill="#0c1410">histories · identities</text>
        <text x="40" y="66" font-family="'IBM Plex Serif', serif" font-style="italic" font-size="11" letter-spacing="0" fill="#0c1410">past + present horizons</text>
        <text x="40" y="82" font-family="'IBM Plex Serif', serif" font-style="italic" font-size="11" letter-spacing="0" fill="#0c1410">barriers · constraints</text>
        <path d="M 100 88 Q 110 130, 162 178" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.6" fill="none"/>
        <text x="500" y="28" text-anchor="middle">BRIDGE</text><line x1="430" y1="34" x2="570" y2="34" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.6"/>
        <text x="500" y="50" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'IBM Plex Serif', serif" font-style="italic" font-size="11" letter-spacing="0" fill="#0c1410">cognitions · feelings</text>
        <text x="500" y="66" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'IBM Plex Serif', serif" font-style="italic" font-size="11" letter-spacing="0" fill="#0c1410">memories · stories</text>
        <text x="500" y="82" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'IBM Plex Serif', serif" font-style="italic" font-size="11" letter-spacing="0" fill="#0c1410">attitudes · intuitions</text>
        <path d="M 500 90 L 500 108" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.6" fill="none"/><path d="M 496 104 L 500 110 L 504 104" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.6" fill="none"/>
        <text x="960" y="28" text-anchor="end">OUTCOMES</text><line x1="820" y1="34" x2="960" y2="34" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.6"/>
        <text x="960" y="50" text-anchor="end" font-family="'IBM Plex Serif', serif" font-style="italic" font-size="11" letter-spacing="0" fill="#0c1410">helps · hindrances</text>
        <text x="960" y="66" text-anchor="end" font-family="'IBM Plex Serif', serif" font-style="italic" font-size="11" letter-spacing="0" fill="#0c1410">impacts · consequences</text>
        <text x="960" y="82" text-anchor="end" font-family="'IBM Plex Serif', serif" font-style="italic" font-size="11" letter-spacing="0" fill="#0c1410">new gaps · new sense</text>
        <path d="M 900 88 Q 890 130, 840 178" stroke="#a06a3a" stroke-width="0.6" fill="none"/>
      </g>
    </svg>

    <div class="metaphor-caption">
      A person, mid-stride in a moment of space-time, building a bridge across a gap — from situation, through the discontinuity, toward outcome.
      After Brenda Dervin, <span class="fig-ref">fig. C2.1</span>.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="abstract-card corner-brackets">
    <span class="bracket-bl"></span><span class="bracket-br"></span>
    <span class="key">SUBJECT</span><span class="val">Brenda Dervin · Sense-Making Methodology (early 1970s–)</span>
    <span class="key">UNIT</span><span class="val">The gap — specific discontinuity, specific person, specific moment</span>
    <span class="key">METHOD</span><span class="val">Micro-Moment Time-Line Interview · neutral questioning</span>
    <span class="key">USE</span><span class="val">Survey design · UX research · funnel diagnosis · A/B post-mortem</span>
  </div>
```
